title: CM Vijay’s oath ceremony sparks CPI, DMK outrage over Thamizhthai Vaazhthu: What is the controversy about?
description: Vijay was sworn in as Tamil Nadu's Chief Minister, promising a ‘new era’ of secularism. However, CPI and DMK criticised the order of state song Tamil Thaai Vaazhthu during the ceremony, calling for it to be prioritised in future government events.
